programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates: How a Ugandan Clinic Exposed a Private Healthcare Tragedy
programme.desc: In a Kampala slum, a group of midwives help vulnerable mothers give birth for free. Under a mile away, a private hospital is out of reach for most of the community, with devastating consequences.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: The demand for human eggs is booming, giving rise to a largely unregulated and dangerous marketplace; in India, meeting a teenage girl caught up in this fertility underworld.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Fake permits, undercover informants and millions of dollars are involved; a US government agency works to prove suppliers to research labs import wild monkeys from Cambodia with false paperwork.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: An estimated $1 trillion lost globally to fraud; with law enforcement struggling to cope, scambaiter vigilantes are filling the gaps.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Rainbow Mountain offers tourists a picture-perfect view that has flooded social media feeds; behind this viral beauty spot is the story of a community at war, cries for help ignored and murder.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.sub-title: Inside a UK Care Visa Scam
programme.desc: Alleged scammers in the U.K. are accused of defrauding would-be migrant health care workers out of tens of thousands of pounds; some victims have turned to a vigilante scammer hunter for help.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Brazil's largest bank robbery; at the heart of the brazen heist is South America's most dangerous gang and its raid on what's is known as the Night of Terror.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: IM Academy sold a dream of financial freedom, but behind the glitz and glamor, some former members say it was a global multilevel-marketing maze that left them financially and emotionally devastated.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance Radio
programme.desc: The economy and the markets are under surveillance as the latest developments in finance, economics and investment is covered; Tom Keene, Paul Sweeney, Lisa Mateo, Michael Barr and other guests create some intriguing conversation.

programme.title: Bloomberg Intelligence
programme.desc: Bloomberg's Alix Steel and Paul Sweeney harness the power of Bloomberg Intelligence to provide in-depth research and data on more than 2,000 companies and 130 industries.

programme.title: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Focusing on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg Businessweek
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring together the latest news from the worlds of business and finance and the interesting stories of global technology, politics, economics and more.

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Artificial intelligence has begun to exhibit early signs of agency.

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Bioacoustics technology and AI are revealing how animals communicate, and may soon allow humans to talk to them.

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry
programme.sub-title: The Future With Hannah Fry Quantum Computing
programme.desc: With the promise of unimaginable computing power, a global race for quantum supremacy is raging.

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Human survival depends on water, yet global reserves are rapidly shrinking; it's now replaced oil as the most likely cause of global conflict; discussing whether technology can help secure humanity's future water needs.

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Pain is a fact of life; for some, it is excruciating and inescapable; but amid the continuing fallout of the opioid crisis, the development of new technologies aims to limit and even eliminate pain.

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Soon, another billion people will be online, mostly from developing nations; ways new users will embrace this technology to transform their lives; its meaning for the rest of the world.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer With Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Hannah Fry visits South Korea to explore how it became a cultural and tech superpower; she trains with a Taekwondo black belt, learns kimchi secrets from a grandmaster and dives into pro gaming.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: Alexander Stubb, President of Finland
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua visits Finland, where the threat from neighboring Russia looms large; she speaks to President Alexander Stubb about Finnish resilience and how his country is preparing for an uncertain future.

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
programme.sub-title: Ray Dalio, Founder of Bridgewater Associates
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua meets Ray Dalio on OceanX in the port of Nice for the UN Ocean Conference. They speak about radical transparency, building and leaving one of the largest hedge funds and what's next.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.sub-title: Investing in Women's Sports With Mellody Hobson
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit down with Mellody Hobson, co-CEO and president of Ariel Investments, to discuss her firm's fund, Project Level, devoted to investing in women's sports.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.sub-title: The Future of Fitness With Peloton's Robin Arzón
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit with Peloton instructor and Vice President of Fitness Programming Robin Arzón about career pivots, managing talent and how she thinks about entrepreneurship.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.sub-title: The CEO Behind Barstool Sports & Food52
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit with Erika Ayers Badan, former chief executive of Barstool Sports and current CEO of Food52, to discuss navigating turnarounds and how setbacks can fuel growth.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.sub-title: How Jerry Jones Built a Cowboys Empire
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly interview Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones on risk-taking, making bold trades and the Main Street philosophy that fueled his rise with the Cowboys.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with Emmanuel Acho about his reinvention from NFL linebacker to media leader, his show Uncomfortable Conversations and his new effort, Speakeasy.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer With Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Hannah Fry visits South Korea to explore how it became a cultural and tech superpower; she trains with a Taekwondo black belt, learns kimchi secrets from a grandmaster and dives into pro gaming.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance Radio
programme.desc: The economy and the markets are under surveillance as the latest developments in finance, economics and investment is covered; Tom Keene, Paul Sweeney, Lisa Mateo, Michael Barr and other guests create some intriguing conversation.

programme.title: Bloomberg Intelligence
programme.desc: Bloomberg's Alix Steel and Paul Sweeney harness the power of Bloomberg Intelligence to provide in-depth research and data on more than 2,000 companies and 130 industries.

programme.title: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Focusing on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg Businessweek
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring together the latest news from the worlds of business and finance and the interesting stories of global technology, politics, economics and more.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Nikolaj travels the world to meet people transforming waste into resources; showing that waste isn't something to hide -- it's something we can rethink as valuable raw material.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Nikolaj Coster-Waldau begins season two and we're reminded of the delicate balance between human progress and protecting our planet.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Shelter is one of humanity's most basic needs; but as the global population grows, so does the construction industry's environmental footprint.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Jason Kelly heads to Maranello, Italy, to speak with Ferrari's leadership about the coming regulatory changes for Formula 1 and how Ferrari's racing technology informs the road cars of today.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.sub-title: Week in the Life of an F1 Driver
programme.desc: Jason Kelly follows Pierre Gasly from Alpine Headquarters to a Paris photo shoot to get a firsthand look at how the business of being an F1 driver goes far beyond the track.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.sub-title: NBA President Stokes Africa's Hoop Dreams
programme.desc: Toronto Raptors President Masai Ujiri leads the only non-US team in the National Basketball Association, and he's spearheading an effort to take the game global.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.sub-title: Shahid Khan Wants to Marry the NFL and EPL
programme.desc: Shahid Khan owns two teams, one in the National Football League and the other in the English Premier League; he's got an ambitious playbook to boost both kinds of football around the world.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.sub-title: Women's Soccer Wants to be More Like the NFL
programme.desc: National Women's Soccer League Commissioner Jessica Berman is presiding over a pivotal moment for women's soccer.

programme.title: Short Docs: Sports
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the businesses and players that shape modern-day sports; exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond.

programme.title: Sex-for-Work Claims in West Africa's Rubber Industry
programme.desc: A company majority-owned by billionaire Vincent Bolloré's Bolloré Group and Hubert Fabri is the subject of allegations of labor abuses at some of its African rubber plantations, including by female workers who say they were forced to engage in sex.

programme.title: The Growing Toll of America's Booming Kratom Industry
programme.desc: American use of the plant Kratom has grown dramatically, spurring both a lucrative industry while worrying health experts; discussing how the unregulated substance is being promoted and even made more potent and how some users are ending up dead.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa

programme.desc: When Alex's friend from the local gym is found murdered, Alex investigates and discovers his friend was involved in an underground badminton competition; Alex and Ernesto must go undercover as badminton players to solve the murder.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: When people begin getting hurt in the unluckiest of ways, the Librarians follow the trail to a casino where the owner appears to possess an artifact capable of stealing people's luck.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Santa takes Flynn, Baird and Jenkins on his first vacation in centuries; the Librarians use Santa's sleigh to save Ezekiel's career-criminal mother, as well as Christmas itself, from Santa's grinch of a brother, the Patron Saint of Thieves.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Drawn into the world of Baird's favorite film noir movie, the Librarians must perfect their skills in lassoing, sharpshooting and snappy dialogue to make it out alive.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: Nate, Eliot and Hardison must intervene when Hurley is caught up in a drug deal.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: When a wealthy businessman asks the team to find his missing wife, they learn the missing woman is part of a ring of grifters running Sweetheart Scams, in which pretty young women woo and wed older men for their money.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The team targets a corrupt pair of siblings and steers them through an elaborate treasure hunt.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Challenger meets up with a former scientific rival; an old witch may have the key to an escape from the Lost World.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Travelers from the future arrive in the Lost World to manipulate history.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Flynn is excited to team up with his Librarian hero, Darrington Dare, to take down an ancient and powerful enemy let loose in the modern day; Darrington leaves the Librarians with a dire warning that there can only be one Librarian.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: When Baird goes after Nicole Noone in an attempt to repair her rift with the Library, she winds up joining Nicole on a mission to retrieve a dangerous artifact before it falls into the hands of Russian grave robbers.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: When dissension threatens the group, Baird takes the Librarians to a charismatic self-help guru's team-building camp on the edge of a forest where people have been mysteriously disappearing.

programme.desc: Latimer hires Nate's father to do a heist in a government office; the team must stage a hostage stand-off when they are trapped inside a building.

programme.desc: The team is forced to recruit old friends and rivals in order to take down Latimer and an enemy from their past.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una típica familia mexicana disfuncional conformada por Gaspar, el padre de la familia, su hijo Jonathan, el abuelo, y un amigo cercano a la familia al que apodan "El Noruego", harán de las suyas en esta comedia animada.

programme.title: Dale play
programme.desc: Los mejores videos de redes sociales. Todo sobre los artistas del espectáculo. Acompañamiento de lo más escuchado en la música.

programme.title: Esto es guerra
programme.desc: Un concurso juvenil que divide a los concursantes en dos equipos mixtos, cada equipo con un capitán y un reto por cumplir que es ordenado por el tribunal.

programme.title: Lagrimita y Costel
programme.desc: Grandes comediantes presentan lo mejor del entretenimiento, junto a grandes nombres de la música, en un show dinámico y loco.

programme.title: A que no puedes
programme.desc: Emocionante juego que enfrenta a dos equipos de celebridades en su intento por realizar pruebas y retos únicos. El equipo que complete con éxito la tarea, ganará dinero para una obra de ayuda social.

programme.title: Chuperamigos
programme.desc: Presentación de los mejores comediantes mexicanos que programa a programa hacen reír al público a carcajadas.

programme.title: Chuperamigos
programme.desc: Presentación de los mejores comediantes mexicanos que programa a programa hacen reír al público a carcajadas.

programme.title: Retofamosos
programme.desc: Seis famosos son reunidos en una azotea para enfrentar los retos más atrevidos, graciosos, chuscos y hasta arriesgados en donde el glamour y la fama se quedan atrás para dar paso a la diversión y el buen humor.

programme.title: Don Cheto al aire
programme.desc: Un espacio en el que don Cheto narra las mejores anécdotas, ingenia increíbles bromas y aborda las noticias más relevantes para sus oyentes, todo esto de la mano de su estilo único y divertido.

programme.title: Minuto para ganar

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony travels half-way round the world to eat the world's best meal at Tetsuya's; along the way, he must survive the Australian outback and a host of wild characters.

programme.title: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: The Japanese have a healthy respect for food, which Tony can definitely appreciate; a trip through a market with a sushi chef prepares Tony for his dinner; he also eats a meal with sumo wrestlers.

programme.title: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Known as Brazil's capital of happiness, Salvador da Bahia offers fruitful local markets and rich cuisine; Tony takes part in a traditional local ceremony and experiences the talents of the famous Bahian artist of the kitchen, Chef Dada.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony travels to Napa to eat at the restaurant of the chef he believes is the best at French cuisine, Thomas Keller, who designs a menu superficially for him.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.sub-title: Los Angeles: My Own Heart of Darkness
programme.desc: Tony isn't so sure about the glamorous world of Los Angeles, so he begins with hot dogs; after a long day, he has gained a new appreciation for the City of Angels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.sub-title: Down Under: The Wild West of Cooking
programme.desc: In Melbourne, Tony meets the wild man of Australian cheese and some breeders of rare English pigs; these food lovers are Tony's kind of folk: gun slinging chefs in a real foodie town.

programme.title: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony returns to his beloved Hanoi, Vietnam to visit his friend, Linh, for the Vietnamese lunar New Year holiday of Tet where they will taste exotic Vietnamese delicacies.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain travels to Scotland for the traditional hearty breakfast, a deep-fried pizza, eggs and a Mars Bar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony travels to Phnom Penh, Cambodia, with a friend; there he explores a unique food culture which is both pleasing to the palette and yet slightly frightening.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.sub-title: Puebla, Where the Cooks Are From
programme.desc: Tony's favorite kitchen comrades all seem to come from Mexico, and he wants to know why; Eddy takes him on a tour of his home and town for some great meals of ant eggs, worms and more.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony joins Jose at the family farm to enjoy a fattened pig at the village feast, and then travels to a destination from his childhood where he debates eating a calf's head.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.sub-title: The Cook Who Came in From the Cold
programme.desc: Tony's friend Zamir shows him around St. Petersburg; Tony makes his way through round after round of blinis, borscht, reindeer, pickled salads and dumplings.

programme.title: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Known as Brazil's capital of happiness, Salvador da Bahia offers fruitful local markets and rich cuisine; Tony takes part in a traditional local ceremony and experiences the talents of the famous Bahian artist of the kitchen, Chef Dada.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony tries to learn the Carioca lifestyle; he can handle the tan, the Brazilian barbecue and the Caipirinhas, but maybe not the speedo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: In Arcachon, France, Tony first learned to love food as a child; in a nostalgic trip down memory lane, he enjoys the food of his childhood including steak frites, gaufres (waffles), soupe de pecheur (fisherman's soup) and fresh oysters.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony explores the three largest types of barbecue when he visits Kansas City, Houston and North Carolina; each offers their own variation of sauce, smoke, ribs and brisket.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain travels to Scotland for the traditional hearty breakfast, a deep-fried pizza, eggs and a Mars Bar.

programme.title: A Cook's Tour
programme.sub-title: Food Tastes Better With Sand Between Your Toes
programme.desc: Tony's favorite escape is the Caribbean island of St Martin, where he enjoys French delicacies, stuffed conch and a johnnycake and saltfish sandwich.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony has always been interested in the Oaxacan tradition in food; a friend leads Tony through a local market in Oaxaca, Mexico, where they taste a variety of interesting foods including tripe, grasshoppers and tequila.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.sub-title: My Life as a Cook - New York City
programme.desc: Tony revisits his first job, the culinary institute that taught him the basics, a normal working day at Les Halles Brasserie, and his mysterious mentor, Bigfoot in this culinary reflection on his own career.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain travels to Scotland for the traditional hearty breakfast, a deep-fried pizza, eggs and a Mars Bar.

programme.title: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Known as Brazil's capital of happiness, Salvador da Bahia offers fruitful local markets and rich cuisine; Tony takes part in a traditional local ceremony and experiences the talents of the famous Bahian artist of the kitchen, Chef Dada.

programme.title: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony decides to go in search of a more relaxed and traditional Japanese culinary experience in the countryside; he travels to an old-fashioned Japanese inn that specializes in kaiseki cuisine, the ancient tea ceremony and using local ingredients.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony has always been interested in the Oaxacan tradition in food; a friend leads Tony through a local market in Oaxaca, Mexico, where they taste a variety of interesting foods including tripe, grasshoppers and tequila.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.sub-title: Cobra Heart: Food That Makes You Manly
programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain travels to Ho Chi Minh for their famous foetal duck egg in a bed of feathers; "flavors of the forest" which includes cobra's heart in blood which will enhance manly qualities.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony decides to share all of his hometown haunts with the viewers; lox and bagels, wine and dinner, a variety of cheese and great hot dogs make his list of top stops.

programme.desc: The gang helps Keiichiro train for a sports festival at school; a mysterious boy shows up at the track meet, running alongside Keiichiro.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.sub-title: Love Is Diving: When a Beauty Puts On a Swimsuit
programme.desc: Ryo is hired to protect the female assistant of a famous French explorer from thugs.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.sub-title: Who the Heck is Ryo? Even the College Girl Is Smitten With the Thrill
programme.desc: Ryo comes across a college girl who is a fan of detective movies, and she tails Ryo for a chance to see some action, not knowing of his lecherous tendencies.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.sub-title: Love Forecast of Rain Then Shine: The Beautiful Newscaster's Umbrella of Love
programme.desc: Ryo is hired by a female weather reporter to protect her from a deranged fan.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: Ryo and Kaori receive a strange request from the head of the Yamaoka family to retrieve his daughter, Tsubaki, from Kazuhiko, the son of the rival Umino family.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Valon uses high-tech armor during a battle with Joey.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey tries to fight back against Valon and his scientifically advanced armor.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Valon and Joey's battle reaches a dramatic climax.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Still exhausted from his battle against Valon, Joey must duel Mai.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and Rafael face off again.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Rafael employs the powers of the Seal of Orichalcos to defeat Pharaoh.

programme.title: Urusei Yatsura: Only You
programme.desc: Everyone in town gets an invitation to Ataru's wedding, and Lum is not listed as the bride.

programme.title: Project A-ko
programme.desc: A superhuman teenager's sidekick is coveted by the spoiled but brilliant daughter of a business tycoon.

programme.title: Future Boy Conan
programme.desc: Trapped by Lepka, Lana and Dr. Lao must navigate Industria's Core Block in search of machine parts.

programme.title: Future Boy Conan
programme.desc: Conan, Jimsy, and Lana reunite with Dyce on the Barracuda, meanwhile Dr. Lao must return to Industria to help save its residents.

programme.title: Future Boy Conan
programme.desc: Conan, Jimsy, and Lana explore High Harbor and meet the villagers but Jimsy can't help but get into mischief.

programme.title: Future Boy Conan
programme.desc: Conan and Jimsy must catch a wild pig in order to redeem themselves with Orlo, the leader of a local gang.

programme.title: Future Boy Conan
programme.desc: Lana has a nightmarish vision that Dr. Lao's flying machine is engulfed in flames and fears an attack; Conan does his best to try and ease her worries.

programme.title: Ronin Warriors
programme.desc: Dais plots to lure the heroes into a trap within the castle gates and separate them from their armor, leaving it up to Mia, Ully and White Blaze to come to the rescue.

programme.title: Ronin Warriors
programme.desc: As the heroes approach Talpa's castle, the enemy attacks and succeeds in splitting up the team; Sage, Ully and Mia encounter Cale in the subway, but the lack of light underground prevents Sage from using his full power.

programme.title: Ronin Warriors
programme.desc: Kento and Rowen meet up in the subway and search for the others while Talpa enacts a plan to turn the heroes to evil based on his knowledge of their armors' dark origins.

programme.title: Ronin Warriors
programme.desc: Despite Anubis' previous failure to follow Talpa's orders, Talpa dispatches him to an amusement park where the heroes have gathered; Kento tries to fight without his armor, fearing that using it will turn him against his friends.

programme.title: Lupin the Third Part 2
programme.desc: The princess of a small Silk Road country has been kidnapped; Lupin and his gang are persuaded to rescue Princess Yasmin in exchange for a stomach full of holy curry made for the gods.

programme.title: Lupin the Third Part 2
programme.desc: An assassin hired by the ICPO Headquarters uses DumDum bullets to overwhelm Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the Third Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang head to the isolated Kimasan after hearing the country possesses mountains of treasure; they sneak across the border but are quickly captured by Kinkaku and Ginkaku, giants who rule the country.

programme.title: Lupin the Third Part 2
programme.desc: A casino tycoon runs for President and brags that with $500 million to spend, the only way he can lose is if Lupin steals his campaign funds.

programme.title: Great Teacher Onizuka
programme.desc: A homeroom teacher with a controversial past is stabbed in the chest.

programme.title: Great Teacher Onizuka
programme.desc: Onizuka reveals the shocking truth about a fellow teacher's stabbing.

programme.title: Great Teacher Onizuka
programme.desc: Declaring himself GTO (Great Teacher Onizuka), Eikichi whips a classroom of juvenile delinquents into shape.

programme.title: Great Teacher Onizuka
programme.desc: Onizuka recognizes a school's vice-principal as a pervert he recently encountered.

programme.title: Space Adventure COBRA
programme.sub-title: Will the Victory Home-Run Be Ours!?
programme.desc: Cobra purposefully suffers an injury so that he can sneak into Mr. Rand's security room during the game, but this leaves his team to play on without him.

programme.title: Space Adventure COBRA
programme.sub-title: Death Match! The Horror of the Sand Ocean

programme.title: Space Adventure COBRA
programme.sub-title: The Two Kings of the Sword
programme.desc: Cobra and Lady are captured and held aboard the Swordians' desert crawler, The Sand Rook. Cobra continues his fight against the Swordians and finds the truth behind one of their legends.

programme.title: Space Adventure COBRA
programme.desc: Cobra decides to visit Jingoro, the man who helped build his ship, The Turtle. However, upon arriving at Jingoro's house, he finds it ransacked and Jingoro's daughter kidnapped.

programme.title: Space Adventure COBRA
programme.sub-title: The Tomb at the Bottom of the Ocean
programme.desc: Cobra and Dominique are on vacation together when they see a massive cruise ship destroyed. Before they can investigate, they're attacked and Dominique is kidnapped.

programme.title: Ghost Stories
programme.desc: Stories spread about something preying on children who are all alone, and the gang gets scared; especially since their parents will be out for the night; a deadly ghost with a sickle in hand stalks Satsuki and her friends.

programme.title: Ghost Stories
programme.desc: People all over town begin acting strangely; most of them have been replaced by mirror-world clones of themselves; with Satsuki and Hajime being the last two people in the town who haven't been swapped, they'll have to find a way to end this ghost.

programme.title: Ghost Stories
programme.sub-title: The Circuit Connects to Hell - Demon of the Underworld
programme.desc: Leo is convinced that there's a ghostly website out there on the internet and is determined to find it, which he does; trapped in the computer, the rest of the gang needs to figure out how to apply old-fashioned exorcism to new technologies.

programme.title: Ghost Stories
programme.sub-title: The Corpse that Roams in the Night - Shirotabi
programme.desc: There's a girl in Satsuki's class who is a little off; she tends to the rabbits at the school, whom she says are her only friends; but if that's weird, then it gets only stranger when a dead rabbit shows back up at the pen, alive and well.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: Tsubaki and Kazuhiko attempt to flee the country to evade the wrath of their parents, but are attacked by a helicopter in the process.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: On the anniversary of the death of his friend Robert Harrison, Ryo gets royally drunk and notices a woman watching him.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: Sophie Silverman is discovered to have been the fiance of Robert Harrison and she reveals her plans for avenging his death.

programme.title: City Hunter '91
programme.sub-title: Big Revival of the Funny Pair! The Beauty Fallen From the Sky

programme.desc: The navy joins the heroes in an effort to stop Dartz at his secret ocean base.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Goat Curry with Rice Pilaf and Carmelized Onions
programme.desc: Chef Andrew butchers a whole goat, using the leg and backstrap for a braised curry.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Boar Ribs and Shrimp and Grits
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern makes a homemade barbecue rub, basting sauce and barbecue sauce for wild boar ribs. Next, chef shares his twist on a classic southern shrimp and grits recipe, adding a side of beautiful wild mushrooms.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Catching Gulf Coast Redfish and Blue Crabs
programme.desc: Pat visits Houston to go Gulf Bay fishing with chef Chris Shepherd, hoping to catch some redfish and gather a side of blue crabs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Roscoe Family Legacy: Alabama Pit Ribs
programme.desc: Pat heads to Birmingham to team up with artist and chef Roscoe Hall, cooking ribs inspired by Roscoe's family legacy.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat meets the trio behind Blood Bros BBQ to discover how three childhood friends seamlessly blended their Asian-American culture with the Texas barbecue traditions they grew up with.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Hickory Smoked Virginia Ham & Mint Juleps
programme.desc: Pat Martin gets a history lesson on the origin of American barbecue from "The Professor" Tuffy Stone.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin heads to the Cherokee National Forest for a day of fly fishing with an old friend, and to cook up their fresh catch over the campfire.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat and his pal Jason Stanhope meet up outside of Charleston for a day of quail hunting and grilling birds over live coals.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to Gainesboro, Tennessee to visit a free-range hog farm, learn about their operations, and grill up a less desired, but no less delicious, cut of hog - pork steaks.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Red Curry Braised Pork with Mustard Greens
programme.desc: Pat Martin is in the frozen tundra of Minnesota to visit his new friend, Chef Yia Vang. They brave the cold and break nearly-frozen ground to barbecue a pig's head in the earth.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin links up with his pal, Bill Darsinos, to enjoy a tradition from the heart of Bill's Greek culture when they cook a whole lamb on a spit roast.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: South Carolina Peach-Glazed Ribs with Rice Middlins
programme.desc: When Pat's friends and fellow barbecue chefs, Bryan Furman and Dr. Howard Conyers, come to town, the guys dig deep into the tricks and traditions of one of Bryan's specialties: pork ribs.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati meets the young chefs behind one of Guadalajara's most exciting restaurants, Xokol. Back home, Pati invites her friend Francisco Migoya over to make conchas to go with pellizcadas with chicharrón in salsa verde.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati visits the birthplace of Mexico's most famous spirit, the town of Tequila. Back home Pati makes a brunch of corn tortilla egg nests with salsa verde con chile de árbol and traditional arroz rojo.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati is in one of Mexico's most popular beach destinations - Puerto Vallarta. She gets an insider's tour of the best street food from one of the town's most acclaimed chefs, Thierry Boulet.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati celebrates everyone's favorite Mexican creation, the taco. In her kitchen, Pati creates a pair of Jalisco-inspired tacos and a Ceviche tostada that are sure to satisfy any true taco-lover.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Gualberto "Weber" Elizondo surprised his family when his grilling hobby turned him into a local celebrity and internet sensation. Meanwhile, chef Chuy Villareal of Cara De Vaca wants the world to know that the north of Mexico isn't just carne asada.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Two sisters made a little shack on the Rio Ramos into a must-visit restaurant known for one dish: cortadillo stew. Down the road, another restaurant uses traditional stews in their famous empalmes.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Nuevo León is divided between two pro soccer teams: Los Tigres and Los Rayados. Pati tries the food at each stadium with the teams' stars to determine who wins in the battle of tortas vs tacos.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Irving Quiroz wrote the book on Mexican bread. Pati visits his workshop for his secret to making the perfect campechana, then meets Chuy Elizondo, owner of one of the hottest brunch spots in town.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: The Garza family invites Pati to their vineyard to help the community make piloncillo - and it's hard work! Then, in the magic town of Bustamante, three sisters make traditional bread in adobe ovens.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Gaby Molinar owns Huerto Urbano, an urban farm dedicated to providing Monterrey with nutritious, diverse local ingredients. And her husband is one of the region's greatest culinary pioneers.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: Cantina Culture and the Morning After?
programme.desc: Cantinas have historically been bars where men gather to drink and sing about their broken hearts. Historian David Canales takes Pati to historic locations. Then she tries the best tacos in town.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: Texas BBQ in the Orange Belt
programme.desc: Pati visits BBQ champion Luis Rivas to taste his Mexican take on Texas-style BBQ, and he hosts a traditional carne asada at his family's orange grove. Then Pati learns how Glorias candies are made.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Chef Hugo Guajardo researches the best of Nuevo León's ingredients. He and Pati visit a family-owned restaurant that has perfected the art of drying meat. Then, she tries his famed charred chicken.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati's climber friends take her on an adventure to the Sierra Madre mountains, followed by a quick elote snack. Later, Pati connects with four top chefs for a carne asada with a mountain backdrop.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.sub-title: Jarred Pepper Pasta and Sheet Pan Brisket
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a speedy jarred-pepper pasta, crispy chicken in baked-bread sauce, and a beef brisket traybake - all prepped in minutes. He makes shelf-raid spiced haricot beans, and rounds it all off with a fast and simple strawberry & balsamic tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.sub-title: Creamy Chicken Pot Pie and Chocolate Tiramisu
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a midweek traybake of roast veg and Camembert. He turns poached chicken into a creamy chicken & chive pie, serves up his easy green chilli salsa under sizzling butterflied prawns, and finishes it all off with decadent chocolate tiramisù.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a speedy midweek chicken traybake. He shows us cool ways to upgrade salmon, knocks up a shelf-raid quesadilla toastie, and transforms a batch-cook Bolognese into cheesy bread bowls. All finished off with a super simple banoffee tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.desc: Jamie kicks off autumn with Italian-inspired cheesy cabbage pasta and smoky sweetcorn burgers with feta. He shares tips for storing onions and saving tomato seeds, finishing with a beautiful tomato galette for a perfect fall meal.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Autumn's Harvest: Roast Chicken and Tarte Tatin
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a roast chicken with eggplant, bakes feta with figs & prosciutto, and creates a runner bean stew with fish. He shares tips for storing berries and chiles, finishing with a stunning pear tarte tatin.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Autumn's Last Bites: Squash Tagliatelle and Blackberry Cobbler
programme.desc: Jamie wraps up autumn with cheesy squash tagliatelle, a mushroom curry with crispy ginger rice, and celeriac remoulade. He forages for blackberries to make a cobbler, the perfect end to a crisp autumn day.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Easy Meals at Christmas
programme.desc: Jamie shares his gorgeous festive food gift ideas, including a sumptuous roasted mulled wine ham, flavoured cheeses and a yule log.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Easy Meals at Christmas
programme.desc: Jamie gets creative with leftovers and makes a pie with turkey, stuffing, gravy and sprouts and creates an epic Christmas strudel.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Autumn's Last Bites: Squash Tagliatelle and Blackberry Cobbler
programme.desc: Jamie wraps up autumn with cheesy squash tagliatelle, a mushroom curry with crispy ginger rice, and celeriac remoulade. He forages for blackberries to make a cobbler, the perfect end to a crisp autumn day.

programme.desc: Jamie shares his gorgeous festive food gift ideas, including a sumptuous roasted mulled wine ham, flavoured cheeses and a yule log.

programme.desc: Jamie gets creative with leftovers and makes a pie with turkey, stuffing, gravy and sprouts and creates an epic Christmas strudel.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Autumn's Last Bites: Squash Tagliatelle and Blackberry Cobbler
programme.desc: Jamie wraps up autumn with cheesy squash tagliatelle, a mushroom curry with crispy ginger rice, and celeriac remoulade. He forages for blackberries to make a cobbler, the perfect end to a crisp autumn day.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: Cantina Culture and the Morning After?
programme.desc: Cantinas have historically been bars where men gather to drink and sing about their broken hearts. Historian David Canales takes Pati to historic locations. Then she tries the best tacos in town.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: Texas BBQ in the Orange Belt
programme.desc: Pati visits BBQ champion Luis Rivas to taste his Mexican take on Texas-style BBQ, and he hosts a traditional carne asada at his family's orange grove. Then Pati learns how Glorias candies are made.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Chef Hugo Guajardo researches the best of Nuevo León's ingredients. He and Pati visit a family-owned restaurant that has perfected the art of drying meat. Then, she tries his famed charred chicken.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati's climber friends take her on an adventure to the Sierra Madre mountains, followed by a quick elote snack. Later, Pati connects with four top chefs for a carne asada with a mountain backdrop.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.sub-title: Jarred Pepper Pasta and Sheet Pan Brisket
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a speedy jarred-pepper pasta, crispy chicken in baked-bread sauce, and a beef brisket traybake - all prepped in minutes. He makes shelf-raid spiced haricot beans, and rounds it all off with a fast and simple strawberry & balsamic tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.sub-title: Creamy Chicken Pot Pie and Chocolate Tiramisu
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a midweek traybake of roast veg and Camembert. He turns poached chicken into a creamy chicken & chive pie, serves up his easy green chilli salsa under sizzling butterflied prawns, and finishes it all off with decadent chocolate tiramisù.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a speedy midweek chicken traybake. He shows us cool ways to upgrade salmon, knocks up a shelf-raid quesadilla toastie, and transforms a batch-cook Bolognese into cheesy bread bowls. All finished off with a super simple banoffee tart.

programme.sub-title: Cantina Culture and the Morning After?

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.sub-title: Creamy Chicken Pot Pie and Chocolate Tiramisu

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a speedy midweek chicken traybake. He shows us cool ways to upgrade salmon, knocks up a shelf-raid quesadilla toastie, and transforms a batch-cook Bolognese into cheesy bread bowls. All finished off with a super simple banoffee tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's 5 Ingredient Mediterranean Meals
programme.sub-title: Pantry Pasta and Rice Pudding Pops
programme.desc: Jamie raids his pantry for a speedy veggie carbonara and rice pudding popsicles.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's 5 Ingredient Mediterranean Meals
programme.desc: Jamie hacks his oven into a rotisserie for crispy chicken and chips and bakes a savory spinach and feta pie. Then, the Godfather of Spanish cuisine, Jose Pizarro, shares some gorgeous Mediterranean flavours using just 5 everyday ingredients.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's 5 Ingredient Mediterranean Meals
programme.desc: Jamie turns frozen fish and veggies into a time saving supper. Then, Italian chef, Gennaro Contaldo rustles up some delicious homemade gnocchi using just 5 easy ingredients.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Easy Meals at Christmas
programme.desc: Jamie shares his gorgeous festive food gift ideas, including a sumptuous roasted mulled wine ham, flavoured cheeses and a yule log.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Easy Meals at Christmas
programme.desc: Jamie gets creative with leftovers and makes a pie with turkey, stuffing, gravy and sprouts and creates an epic Christmas strudel.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to a picturesque cattle farm in California's Santa Maria Valley, to hear firsthand from a young pitmaster who has uncovered the secrets of real Santa Maria barbecue.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Pit-Cooked Chicken with Alabama White Sauce
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to Decatur, Alabama to visit a storied institution of barbecue - Big Bob Gibson's. There, he learns the ins, the outs, and the history of a regional delicacy: pit-cooked chicken with Alabama white sauce.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Legend of Louis Mueller's Dino Beef Ribs
programme.desc: Pat visits his close friend Wayne Mueller, third-generation pitmaster of Louis Mueller's BBQ, to learn the ins and outs of his famous dino beef ribs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin teams up with fellow pitmasters to showcase the rugged and nuanced tradition of whole-hog cooking, West Tennessee-style.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Bluefin Tuna Collars with Chili Pickle Relish
programme.desc: Pat Martin visits chef Adam Perry Lang in Los Angeles, where the pair cook a prized catch castoff cut - Bluefin Tuna collars.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Discovering Indian Lamb Kebabs in Nashville
programme.desc: Pat grills riverside with renowned chef Vivek Surti, crafting lamb mamna and chicken kebabs inspired by his Indian heritage.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Secret to Texas-Style Smoked Brisket
programme.desc: Pat and his buddy Leonard Botello use the flavors of the beloved native Post Oak to smoke a perfect Central Texas-style beef brisket.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat visits Edgar Victoria, known for bringing the street foods of Mexico City to Nashville, to do some live fire cooking out in nature as they prepare one of his favorite dishes - skirt steak tlayuda.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat travels to the Emerald Coast of Destin, Florida, to join his friend Adam Evans on a spearfishing adventure, sourcing fresh fish to cook over live fire.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Hickory Smoked Virginia Ham & Mint Juleps
programme.desc: Pat Martin gets a history lesson on the origin of American barbecue from "The Professor" Tuffy Stone.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: Head to the Serra Da Mantiqueira Mountains, Brazil, to explore a 2000 square metre, grid shaped family home hidden in nature, then visit a wartime bunker on the Isle of Wight in the UK that's been transformed into an ultra modern home.

programme.title: Luxury Homes Revealed
programme.desc: Our first home is located in Palm Springs, then we get an exclusive peek inside an incredible private estate in the Hollywood Hills. Next we travel to Hampton, Australia and then we take a tour of a resort-like home in Park City, Utah.

programme.title: Luxury Homes Revealed
programme.desc: Our first home is a sprawling and beautiful estate located in Montecito, California. Then we see a European inspired Montecito mansion. To Sydney, Australia to visit a house with water views. Then Hollywood Hills to witness an architectural gem.

programme.title: Luxury Homes Revealed
programme.desc: Today we are looking at houses that personify luxury. The first home is located in Rancho Mirage, California. We check out a grand loft in Midtown Manhattan. Next we travel to Brighton, Australia and finally to Palm Springs, a boathouse property.

programme.title: Luxury Homes Revealed
programme.desc: Today on Luxury Homes Revealed we get an exclusive tour of an extraordinary Beverly Hills mansion. On our way check out an amazing family home in Newport Coast. We travel to Merricks, Australia to visit a modern farmhouse. Then back to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Luxury Homes Revealed
programme.desc: Our first home is in Brentwood, California, a bright and airy design. Then we tour a masterpiece in sunny California. We travel to Australia for a look at a renovated modern farmhouse. Lastly, we tour a six-bedroom masterpiece in Park City, Utah.

programme.title: Luxury Homes Revealed
programme.desc: Our first home is located in Hancock Park, a recently renovated 1928 estate. Then we tour an English-inspired manor in Bel Air. Afterwards we travel to Australia, and then lastly we take a tour of a massive home in the Hollywood Hills.

programme.title: Luxury Homes Revealed
programme.desc: Our first home is in Beverly Hills, California. A 10,000 square foot estate that sits above the city. A six level landmark home in New York City. To Australia to visit a home with a unique design. To Beverly Hills to see a 7,000 square foot estate.

programme.title: Luxury Homes Revealed
programme.desc: Our first home is located in Bel Air, California. This stunning contemporary home has impressive views. Then we tour a European inspired chateau. We then travel to Melbourne in Australia and lastly we tour this newly renovated home in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Luxury Homes Revealed
programme.desc: Our first home is located in the Hollywood Hills, which has panoramic views of the city. Then we tour this top level Brooklyn penthouse with breathtaking views. Traveling to Armadale, Australia, and then we tour an exclusive home in West Hollywood.

programme.title: Luxury Homes Revealed
programme.desc: Our first home is located in Hawaii, a beachfront property with views of coastal waters. Then we check out an oceanfront home in Honolulu. We travel to Australia to see a family home. Then we tour a $30 million compound that sits right on the beach.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Marlow, Phil, their 3 small kids, and Phil's parents all live in one crowded house. Brian and Sarah transform their yard into a spectacular space for cooking, entertaining and playing.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Andrea and David are foodies, but hosting in their "builder basic" yard is no fun. Brian and Sarah make their farm-to-table dreams come true, with a veggie garden, dining room, BBQ zone, and a play space for their 2 kids.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Newlyweds Cheryl and Gavin love their new home, but Cheryl doesn't love the sound of Gavin's woodworking in the garage. Brian and Sarah help by building a dedicated woodshop and some chic new living space in their urban backyard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Bachelor Kyle's father Jack has helped him renovate his new home, but the backyard is still unusable. To help Kyle throw the ultimate housewarming party, Brian and Sarah build a sexy sports pub, a lounge area and a firepit.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Lynna is a single mom with three teenage kids and the time has come for her to have the back garden of her dreams. Brian and Sarah deliver in spades, with a 3 season hang-out, lush new landscaping, and a beautiful greenhouse.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Melissa and Lee's 3 boys need more room for sports, and Mom needs more peace and quiet! So Brian and Sarah turn the underused backyard into a sports court, a new lounge space, and a luxurious, 3-season Mom's retreat.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Couple Farzana & Reyan have maxed out all living space in their city-sized bungalow, leaving no room for Reyan's at-home stained glass business or Farzana's writing. Brian and Sarah build Reyan a spacious studio and construct an inspiring deck area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Carly & Nate's social media star dog, Dean the Basset Hound, has a lot of four-legged friends visiting, leaving the home feeling cramped. Brian and Sarah make a bar/lounge for pet and owner gatherings, along with a stylish outdoor entertainment area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Sandra & David's eldest daughter, Harlow, was born with vision challenges and their youngest daughter, Delilah, is just learning to walk. Brian and Sarah build a colorful playland for both children, while also building a decked out BBQ & dining area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.sub-title: A Space For Dancing and Hanging
programme.desc: Susan's energetic son, Harrison, has no space to dance at home without getting under his mom's feet. Brian and Sarah build a hang out / dance space for Harrison and create a California-inspired pool and lounge area for Susan.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Brian and Sarah create a backyard for Pam & Kevin that matches their lush forest surrounding complete with a double wrap around deck and a hot tub. The team also build a workshop for Kevin to perfect his craft of leather tooling.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Aarati & Dave both work from home, forcing their living room to be a triple duty working/living/childrens' play area. Brian and Sarah create a flexible structure, install a sleek and sophisticated plunge pool, and create an outdoor fireplace lounge.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Love is large but space is tight for Lara & Mike and their 5 children. Brian and Sarah free up space by building an activity-packed tree house and recreation court for the children, with grilling, dining and lounging areas for the whole family.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Sandra & David's eldest daughter, Harlow, was born with vision challenges and their youngest daughter, Delilah, is just learning to walk. Brian and Sarah build a colorful playland for both children, while also building a decked out BBQ & dining area.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: This episode follows a fear-less single mother pioneering a brand new, beehive-inspired 'kit' home on her seriously steep plot in the picture-perfect Tamar Valley.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Heather Li and Phil Lines lead jet-setting lives and have dreamt of a wilderness home where they can unwind. Stumbling across their perfect plot on the rugged North West coast of Scotland, they realize conventional house building would be impossible.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: The Lambert family have spent the last 9 years searching for a home to call their own. To make building their new home affordable, the family discover a futuristic kit house company in Poland.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: This episode follows a charismatic petrolhead attempting to build a pioneering, eco-home from a kit of parts to house his ten classic cars.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Bill and Sukie Barber have decided to build a new house in one of their fields using primarily locally sourced materials to fit with their sustainable lifestyle: an ambitious remit in such a secluded corner of the Borders.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: While on holiday in the Outer Hebrides, Ruth Hamilton and John Henry fell in love with the isolated wilderness of the Isle of Harris. To make their new home possible, the couple found an innovative construction company, who specialize in kit houses.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Scott, Lisa and their 12-year-old son Archie live in a rented house in the suburbs with no space and individuality that they desire from a home. Instead the family has ordered their new home from a specialist log construction company.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Steve Langstone and his wife Sharon found their perfect plot in some ancient woodland on the side of a lake, where they wanted to construct a home. They found an innovative company that specializes in constructing homes that are technically moveable.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A 300-year-old Scottish ruin that's been brought back to life. In the Sierra Nevada mountain, an angular home built from zinc and glass. In Sardinia a stunning waterfront villa. And in Germany, a wartime bunker that lay abandoned for 70 years.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: In the Cotswolds, UK, a unique home built into a lake. Lake Ontario, a home that resembles an ocean liner, and then to Portugal, where in land, a ruin has been transformed into a minimalist's dream with a pool concealed in the roof.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A futuristic villa built on the edge of a lake in Austria. A cabin perched on the edge of a river. A unique beachside house built into the rock, and in rural England a modern mirrored house, designed to blend into and reflect its rural setting.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: Venture into the Spanish countryside to explore an enchanting villa. A cliffside retreat that is ultra-modern. In rural Quebec, a cabin that resembles a pair of binoculars perched on a cliff, and finally a woodland retreat in Portugal.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Nicole and Caffery transform a townhouse into an absolute dream for Nicole and her two daughters, while helping real estate pro Chris uncover and stage this cluttered suburban listing.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Nicole and Caffery design an executive rental suite to help supplement Vashti's path to retirement, while real estate agent Kelsey pursues Nicole and Caffery's much-needed staging expertise to help sell her clients' colorful and chaotic townhouse.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Nicole and Caffery bring all the moody design vibes to their first speakeasy lounge for game enthusiasts Krysti and Dana; while real estate agent Natalie's compact condo listing needs staging help to spark it into a luxe and warm downtown home.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Finally mortgage-free, Denise is now ready for her main floor to go from bleak to chic.Nicole and Caffery will create a maximalist, welcoming space that reflects her larger than lifepersonality!

programme.title: Styled
programme.sub-title: Old Plan to Open Floor Plan
programme.desc: Sarah and Mark's house needs to be brought into the 21st century so Nicole and Cafferywill create a new, timeless and functional design for their family; real estate pro Karinaneeds help morphing a virtually staged listing into a real showstopper.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: With renters in the basement, Sarah and Shawn have nowhere to go but up to find some tranquility. Nicole and Caffery take on their dated bedroom and ensuite to create an elevated oasis.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Baking Artisinal Pastries in Mallorca, Spain
programme.desc: Pastry Chef Ravneet Gill takes Fred to Mallorca to experience incredible island cooking, from a buzzing beach bar serving holiday food in the sun, to light and fluffy pastries.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix is heading to Bristol for a winter treat in the company of Michel Roux Junior. Michel can't wait to show Fred his favourites, from the perfect French bistro to a festive countryside escape and Jamaican jerk turkey.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Searching for the Best Pizza in Rome, Italy
programme.desc: Chef Giorgio Locatelli takes Fred to Rome in search of the city's most exciting eats. Sublime pasta, fluffy gnocchi and the world's best pizza all delicious but affordable.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Chef Nadiya Hussain shows Fred the culinary sights of Yorkshire including Bettys' iconic tea and cakes, a rural Wensleydale cheese farm and shop, and a small restaurant which serves home made samosas, Nadiya's favourite spicy Indian snack.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: The Master Pasta Maker of Puglia, Italy
programme.desc: TV and radio host Dermot O'Leary takes Fred Sirieix to Puglia in Italy's deep South to his favourite restaurants showcasing simple but sublime cucina povera or poor man's cooking.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: TV Chef Andi Oliver takes Fred to Marrakech to enjoy lamb and couscous at legendary restaurant, chicken tagine for under £10, and breakfast on a roof terrace.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Chris Bavin takes Fred to the New Forest, where fresh local produce is king. Featuring wood-fired cooking, pork pies and a country pub serving the perfect Ploughman's.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.sub-title: Chiles, Burgers, & Tenderloins in Santa Fe
programme.desc: Frankie heads to Santa Fe investigating New Mexican cuisines eating green chili burgers, poblano chile stews, and sweet blue-corn pancakes.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.desc: Frankie explores Hawaii's O'ahu island to get nourished from fresh tuna poke, heartfelt Pho, and hand-pounded poi.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.sub-title: Pierogies, Bagels, and Ramen in NYC
programme.desc: Frankie Celenza takes a LOT of bites out of the big apple as he samples warm pillowy bagels & schmear, grabs pierogies at an old school Ukrainian spot, gets the scoop on innovative ice cream flavors, and slurps up some real ramen.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.sub-title: Loaded Dogs & Classic Cocktails in San Diego
programme.desc: Frankie Celenza heads to San Diego to sample a modern spin on classic deli fare, heavily loaded low-riding hot dogs, frosty & fruity Taiwanese snow ice, and fancy French cocktails from a rotating carousel bar.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.sub-title: Smash Burgers & A Slice in Los Angeles
programme.desc: Frankie Celenza heads to all the buzzworthy spots in LA - cooking up calamari steak at a classic Mexican joint, tasting taro root donuts with fun flavors, grabbing a guanciale slice, and hopping on the line to make cheesy scrumptious smash burgers.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.desc: Frankie Celenza goes down south to try Austin's best bets - breakfast tacos are on the itinerary, as well as a bangin' beer garden & sausage house, loaded biscuits, and dessert pancakes to boot! Austin may be weird but the food is fabulous.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.desc: Frankie Celenza goes on the best pizza party crawl that Brooklyn has to offer. He'll try a Neo-Neapolitan pie, a classic coal oven favorite, he'll hit up a modern joint with innovative toppings, and a cozy Italian-owned neighborhood spot.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.sub-title: BBQ Bowls & Puffy Tacos in San Antonio
programme.desc: Frankie Celenza gets his spurs on to sample San Antonio's best all-day brunch, taste some epic puffy tacos at a classic car joint, create colorful conchitas, and bask in the beauty of BBQ Thai curry bowls.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon wants to show Fred & Gino that the food and fresh produce are off the charts! In Las Vegas they indulge in one of the most expensive beef burgers. After a night at the casino they're on the road again to experience the real wild west.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gino & Fred are excited to head to San Francisco for their very own Summer of Love. Gordon tries to embrace the flower power mood, but he's more interested in the 61 Michelin Stars. The boys travel to a Napa Valley vineyard in a hot air balloon.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: After four weeks on the road Gino's airing his feet in the back seat as the guys cruise along a Texan highway. Texas is a meat lovers paradise and Gordon is keen to show the Europhiles some of the best BBQ known to man.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mamma Mia! Off We Go Again
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to Greece to immerse themselves in the culinary traditions. The taste buddies go island-hopping, keen to learn more about the Mediterranean diet and how the country has one of the healthiest populations in the world.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Go Greek! Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: The boys are in the Greek capital Athens in a vintage VW campervan. This is where high-concept cuisine originated & is still being re-invented, in a city known as the birth place of democracy and the cradle of western civilisation.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie's soaking up inspiration in Spain with tapas, flavor-charged rice dishes, and spectacular seafood. He cooks a stunning pork chop with peppers and alioli and a surf and turf skewer of prawns, mushrooms, and local ham.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie explores Tunisia to meet traditional couscous makers, eat delicious street food, and get invited to cook with local chefs on a beach. Inspired by everything he sees, Jamie cooks crispy prawn parcels and a chicken and merguez sausage stew.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Marseille in the south of France. Inspired by their stunning seafood, the traditional flavors of Provence, and the multicultural dishes being served up there, he cooks up a steak with a twist and a sublime courgette and olive tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki. Inspired by meze plates and traditional island cuisine he cooks up a smoky aubergine flatbread and a lemony chargrilled chicken with tzatziki and rice.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke arrives in Saigon for a breakfast of iced coffee with condensed milk and a vermicelli noodle dish. Later, he visits his favourite Pho restaurant, then cooks up some spicy Chilli Crab Claws.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food journey in Bangkok where he searches for the best Tom Yum soup and entertains the locals with a rare Thai delicacy.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.sub-title: Malaysian Flying Noodles and Pork Bone Soup
programme.desc: In Kuala Lumpur, Luke meets the famous Mr Hung with a reputation for flying instant noodles and Mr Sou who cooks a hearty Pork Bone Soup with medicinal herbal properties.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food adventure exploring Jakarta, a melting pot of diverse cultural cuisines, where he indulges in an Indonesian dessert, the sweet Martabak, known as the "King of Street Food".
